title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that while the US leads in AI chips, models, and applications, China has structural advantages in power generation and distribution for data centers. The US fragmented governance across federal, state, and local levels slows infrastructure deployment, whereas China's centralized mandate through NDRC and NEA enables rapid buildout of UHV transmission and Eastern Data Western Compute strategy.
